CONTENT.Honours: Lech PoznańPolish Super Cup: 2016Lech Poznań IIIII liga, gr. II: 2018–19IndividualEkstraklasa Young Player of the Month: July 2019
CONTENT.Club career: In September 2020, Gumny joined Bundesliga club FC Augsburg on a five-year contract. The transfer fee paid to Lech Poznań was reported as €2 million plus possible bonuses.
CONTENT.External links: Robert Gumny at SoccerwayRobert Gumny at 90minut.pl (in Polish)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 17 February 2024As of match played 24 March 2023
CONTENT.International career: On 11 November 2020, Gumny debuted for the Polish senior squad in a friendly match against Ukraine as a starter. He was later included for the 2022 FIFA World Cup, but did not play in any match of the tournament.

SUMMARY: Robert Krzysztof Gumny (born 4 June 1998) is a Polish professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Bundesliga club Augsburg and the Poland national team.
